services.name: Standard
services.description: Normal pickup-to-delivery transit; standard transit times.

services.name: Expedited
services.description: Faster than standard; may require team drivers and tighter dispatch.

services.name: Hot Shot
services.description: Time-critical small shipments via gooseneck/HS rig.

services.name: Final Mile
services.description: Last-leg residential or business delivery, often inside-delivery or threshold.
